page: Microsoft Azure E128ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 128 vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core. It includes 7559 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. No GPUs are present in this configuration.

Benchmark data places this server in the top tier (top 10%) across multiple performance dimensions. It achieves a stress-ng multi-core CPU score of 232,766.23 and a PassMark CPU score of 131,808.85. Memory performance is exceptionally strong, with a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 11,983.28 GB/sec and large block uncached write bandwidth of 202.2 GB/sec. Database operations are highly efficient, demonstrated by a Redis SET throughput of 171.99 million operations per second and a PassMark database operations score of 40,176.82.

The server also demonstrates strong capabilities in CPU-based machine learning and data processing. LLM inference speeds reach 311.0 tokens per second for prompt processing on a medium 7B model, and 66.06 tokens per second for text generation. Given the high memory capacity, substantial local storage, and top-tier multi-threaded performance, this instance is highly suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise applications, and intensive data processing pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure E128ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by a dedicated 128-vCPU AMD EPYC 9V45 processor and Microsoft Hyper-V virtualization. Featuring 1024.0 GB of system memory (8.0 GB per core) and 7559 GB of local storage, this instance is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Benchmark results place the server in the top 10% for multi-core CPU performance, database operations, and memory bandwidth, with Redis SET operations reaching 171.99 million operations per second. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and cryptography acceleration. Lacking a GPU, it relies on its high-density x86_64 architecture to deliver top-tier performance for large databases, in-memory caching, and data-intensive processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB of RAM, and 7559 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier performance for enterprise database and analytical workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E128ads_v7 is a memory-optimized server featuring 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 7559 GB local storage for demanding database workloads.
tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized platform featuring 128 vCPUs and over seven terabytes of local storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 128 vCPUs powered by AMD EPYC 9V45 processors
1024 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
7559 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Optimized for large-scale databases and in-memory caching
